_comment: Custom configuration for coverage_diff.py. All sections are optional — omit any section to use built-in defaults.
_comment_registration_points: Pairs of pixel coordinates: [x_before, y_before, x_after, y_after]. Pick 5–8 identifiable locations visible in both screenshots (major city coverage clusters, coastal landmarks). More points = better registration, but each must be accurately located.
_comment_geo_control_points: Pixel coordinates in the AFTER image mapped to WGS84 lon/lat. Used to project state boundaries onto the image. Format: [px_x, px_y, longitude, latitude].
_comment_ui_exclusions: Rectangular regions [y0, y1, x0, x1] in the BEFORE image that contain UI chrome (legend boxes, buttons, attribution bars). These are set to 'invalid' and excluded from analysis. Set to [] if the before image has no UI overlay.
_comment_ui_exclusions_after: Same format as ui_exclusions, but for the AFTER image. New in v2 — the after image is now masked too. Leave [] if it was cropped to the map canvas.
_comment_color_thresholds: Pixel colour thresholds for classifying coverage types. ocean_rgb is the background map colour. green_lead / purple_lead are how much the dominant channel must exceed the others.
